title: Hotel Grand
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hotel Grand''' was a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] stayed there in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] while attending the [[Conclave on the Plight of the Refugees]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
